text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, shortly before Valentine's...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Please! I beg of you to help me, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If that's all you want, why didn't you just say so
back in the dorm? Why come all the way to my
classroom?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was in a hurry, and... I wanted to see what you
were like in study mode. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good grief... Okay. I'll help you after class.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Brilliant! Thank you, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: M-my... Did you hear that?
choice_data_list:
If you need help with something, I can chip in
too.

If you need help with something, I can chip in
too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it's fine! There's no need to trouble
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We don't have training today if I'm not mistaken.
Ergo, you need not come check on me. Good day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shot down...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that time on, Fine Motion starts rushing
home the second training is finished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should talk to her security captain...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I'm very sorry, but I don't involve myself in Her
Highness's personal affairs...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you spare some time to meet with
me after school today?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you! See you then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After classes finish for the day, I head to our
meeting spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, here you are! Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Good afternoon. We've taken the liberty of
starting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's security team is gathered around
her, enjoying a meal.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to show a small token of my
appreciation for all the trouble everyone goes
through for me every day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So I cooked up this banquet with some help from
Groove! ♪

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I, too, was only invited a short time ago.
Normally, I would never permit myself to eat
alongside Her Highness in this manner, b—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! It's Valentine's Day! Do try some,
Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It looks like everyone is enjoying themselves. I
suppose helping you prepare everything was
worth the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I brought what you asked for, but... are you really
going to use this?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Woo! I wub you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This is a fan that people use at idol concerts to
cheer for their "oshis"! I thought it would be the
perfect way to convey my gratitude to
everyone. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Woo! I wub you too, Groove! And I wub you,
Captain!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...My condolences, Captain.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I don't know what you mean...
Excuse me, Your Highness. You look so charming
that I would like to capture this moment. May I
take a photo?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Does everyone around Fine do nothing but dote on
her?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Woo! Love and peace! And an extra
helping of veggies for all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I return to my office after handling
some business one day to find a card placed on
my desk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing else written on it, but there's only
one person I can think of who would make a card
like this.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah... Hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So you've found it.
choice_data_list: This card is from you, right?
This card is from you, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes. Um, I have something I wish to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay. Act as usual...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: SURPRISE!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This is for you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion hands me some colorful preserved
flowers.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I made them myself... with some help from
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She knows all about flowers, so she assisted with
choosing the types and showed me how to handle
them.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I think they should last a long time when
preserved like this. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Do you like them? Oh, I do hope you like them!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I thought that today would be a great
opportunity to show my appreciation for you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I wanted to prepare some words for you as well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But when I gaze upon your face, I feel like
something peculiar will escape my lips, so I've
abandoned that idea!
choice_data_list: What do you mean by peculiar?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The fact I didn't say should tell you it's a secret.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...However, I put all of my feelings into your gift. I
hope you'll cherish it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right. Much obliged.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I shall endeavor to keep these feelings in full
bloom forevermore.
